metadata.name: Set up Stage for a Concert

description: The operations crew needs to set up the stage, lighting, and sound system for a touring concert.

nodes.task_description: Review the artist's technical rider for all stage, sound, and lighting requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent extracts the detailed technical specifications.

nodes.task_description: Create work orders for the in-house lighting and sound technicians.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates detailed work orders for the technical teams.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with the tour's production manager to ensure a smooth load-in and setup process.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent communicates with the tour manager to align on the schedule.
